spec.name: A Small Path Through The Light Forest
spec.description: You are on a small path leading through the forest. The trees are tall and slender. Paths lead north and south.

north.description: The path leads north through the young trees.

south.description: The path leads south through the young trees.

extra_descs.description: The narrow path is probably used by the animals living in the forest.
The trees are fairly young, not much more than a hundred years or so.
